result.stdout:
swimburger - Personal intro card for Niels Swimberghe (Swimburger)

USAGE:
  swimburger [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
  --help, -h    Show this help message
  --json        Output profile data as JSON
  --yaml        Output profile data as YAML
  --vcard       Output profile data as vCard (VCF format)

EXAMPLES:
  swimburger              Display visual profile card
  swimburger --json       Output as JSON
  swimburger --yaml       Output as YAML
  swimburger --vcard      Output as vCard

MORE INFO:
  Website: https://swimburger.net
  GitHub:  https://github.com/Swimburger
